untranslatable_reason: Signal requires multi-timeframe analysis (lower timeframe confirmation), risk/reward ratio calculations, predetermined retracement levels relative to 'setup leg', and position sizing based on stop distance — none of which can be expressed with single-bar indicators. 'Setup leg' is a contextual reference requiring external definition. Lower timeframe data and multi-timeframe logic are not available in the indicator set.
translation_notes: Partially translated using price_pos_20 as proxy for retracement level (25-75% range). Used rejection candle logic: lower_wick > body for long pullbacks, upper_wick > body for short pullbacks. Exit condition models breaking pullback low/high without confirmation structure. Critical missing elements: (1) Multi-timeframe validation, (2) Risk/reward ratio thresholds, (3) Position sizing rules, (4) Setup leg definition and tracking, (5) Confirmation distance metrics. This signal requires manual implementation of context-dependent logic outside the backtest engine.
